topic: There is a video on my drone's SD card that I never recorded
title: There Is a Video on My Drone's SD Card That I Never Recorded | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: There is a four minute video on my drone's SD card that I did not record. It shows my house at night.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small black SD memory card lying on a wooden desk beside a folded drone, dim home office light, the card label slightly worn, the surrounding desk visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I fly a small drone for landscape photography. Daytime only.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a small consumer quadcopter drone resting on a grass field at golden hour, two propellers visible, soft late afternoon light, distant trees in soft focus, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I checked the card last Sunday. Editing trip footage.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a video editing software with a folder of imported clips visible as thumbnails, dim home office light, ambient evening glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Found a file dated three weeks ago. Eleven PM. Four minutes.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing a video file properties window with a recording date and length visible, dim ambient light, the rest of the screen interface in soft focus, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I had not flown that night. Drone was in the closet.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a residential closet with a drone in its hard case on a top shelf, the closet door slightly ajar, dim ambient bedroom light, the rest of the closet in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a laptop screen showing a video paused mid-frame on a dark aerial shot, the play button visible at the bottom of the screen, dim ambient room light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Aerial footage. My neighborhood. My street. Approaching my house.
scenes.image_prompt: wide aerial shot at night of a quiet suburban residential street, houses visible from above with porch lights on, one specific house in the foreground larger as if approaching, dim ambient night light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The drone hovered outside my bedroom window for two minutes.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a residential bedroom window viewed from outside at night from a slight elevation, curtains visible behind the glass, a soft interior light glowing through, dark suburban night around the frame, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then it flew through the open kitchen window. Recorded inside.
scenes.image_prompt: interior wide shot of a kitchen at night seen from a low angle near a window, the window curtains slightly parted, the kitchen ambient light off, faint moonlight illuminating the counters, no figure visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Footage of me sleeping. Hallway. My daughter's bedroom.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a dim residential hallway at night seen from a low angle, the doors of bedrooms visible on both sides, all closed, soft nightlight glow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then back out the kitchen window. Same way it came.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior shot of a kitchen at night seen from a low angle approaching a window, the curtains visible at the edges, faint dawn light beyond the glass, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I deleted the file. Reformatted the card. The video is back this morning.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a laptop screen showing the same video file thumbnail in the SD card folder, the recent date stamp visible at the corner, dim ambient morning light, vertical 9:16 framing
